title: Rue des Renaudes

title: Rue Cambacérès
description:

title: Rue des Acacias
description: Grand 2 pièces atypique, 45 m², au 5ème étage avec ascenseur. Immeuble sur rue calme à sens unique. Cuisine fermée tout-équipée moderne sur mesure. 45 sqm, 5th floor with elevator.

Equipments : Microwave, Regular oven, 3 Induction hot plates, small appliances, Nespresso coffee machine, toaster. Large bedroom with a bed 160 * 200cm, flat screen tv, desk. Modern decoration.
Large wardrobe / closet in the bedroom.
Bathroom with shower ensuite to bedroom, toilet inside the bathroom. Washing/dryer machine in the bathroom. Very bright and very quiet.
Central heating. And hot water.
Located in Ternes neighborhood.
Rent : 100,00 € /day (Building Fees + Internet + electricity + houskeeping + Technical Support7/7)
